evidence.snippet: Castle withholds applicable sales tax for orders to be delivered to addresses within Kansas. Each customer shall be solely responsible for all sales taxes, or other taxes, on orders shipped to any other location.

headquarters.notes: Full address '540 N Rogers Road, Olathe, KS 66062 USA' appears in terms-of-use (resource-0006 line 68) as the legal arbitration contact address, but that line exceeds the 60-word citation limit. Line 74 confirms Kansas jurisdiction. Phone area code 913 corroborates the Kansas City metro / Olathe location.

tagline: Electronic speed controllers and brushless motors for rotorcraft and multi-rotor platforms, ranging from 6S to 12S systems with rated capacities from 40 to 160 amps. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Primarily serves hobbyist and commercial RC markets; public evidence of defense application or supply-chain integration is limited.
